meaning: [复]n.[用作单]排除有害印象精神治疗法
examples: "Dianetics" also promises heightened powers of intelligence and perception.
In 1950, Hubbard, then 39, published Dianetics: the Modern Science of Mental Health.
By the time Haggis began reading it, "Dianetics" had sold about two and a half million copies.
He was determined to avoid the usual claim that Dianetics offered a triumphal march toward enlightenment.
In 1988, Scientology sponsored a Dianetics car in the Indianapolis 500.
